name: port-daddy
description: Authoritative port manager and multi-agent coordination for local development. 9 essential tools loaded by default (begin_session, end_session_full, whoami, claim_port, release_port, add_note, acquire_lock, list_services, pd_discover). Use pd_discover to access 36 additional tools across 12 categories. Pass --full for all 45 tools.
author: Curiositech
